feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 106,254Chapters: 19/20Kudos: 74

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it. Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Lancelot/Merlin (Merlin)
  • Gwaine/Merlin (Merlin)

entry.title: Non Mortale siblings
entry.summary:
Author: Karma1t

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,054Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 18

Summary: Balinor leaves Hunith 3 days after the 6th child birth. Family fells carried by two sons, later one. One by one everyone leaves. Family reunite at Camelot grounds. They have stories, ups and downs. But once broken bond rebuilds, now stronger then ever. The siblings finds, they best life’s at Camelot grounds. Yet way to this happiness is way too long

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 353,775Chapters: 75/110Kudos: 3,378

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: Found a place so safe
entry.summary:
Author: Ace_Teagirl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,776Chapters: 2/15Kudos: 3

Summary: It had been a week since Morgana returned to Camelot. A week of smiling at Uther. A week of playing the role of the perfect Lady the King had tried to mould her into. A week of reconnecting with Arthur after years of keeping him at arm’s length. She found that he was not the mirror of Uther she had once thought him to be. For the first time in a long while, she understood what Merlin saw in him. She had had her doubts, but now she was sure of it. Arthur could be a great King someday, but he needed all the help he could get, and one part of helping him was telling him the truth.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Bruise
entry.summary:
Author: hpalsowritessecretly

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,849Chapters: 2/7Kudos: 4

Summary: Merlin trips and Arthur becomes fixated on the resulting bruise. Meanwhile, Merlin tries to distract Arthur from finding out about his magic with some convoluted 4D chess. This is 30% them bickering and 70% vague smut. They don’t explicitly have sex but they do jerk each other off a few times.

entry.title: Blood Doesn’t Matter (But You'd Never Know It)
entry.summary:
Author: livinginthetheater

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,791Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 139

Summary: Over the years of having Merlin as his manservant, Arthur learns a lot of secrets about him—except maybe one thing, but in his defense, how was he supposed to know Merlin was running around learning how to fight with his knights? Or, a sequel to Blood Doesn’t Matter ('Til You Get Cut Open)

entry.title: Different Destiny: The Outlaw Prince
entry.summary:
Author: tansyuduri

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 116,318Chapters: 24/26Kudos: 255

Summary: When Merlin's magic is exposed shortly before season 2 starts, the path of destiny starts changing forever. Now on the run with Arthur, Morgana, and Gwen. Merlin hopes to convince Arthur that magic is totally good instead of him and Morgana just being an exception. Morgana, meanwhile, hopes to convince him to usurp his father. As allies are gathered and Arthur realizes the injustice in his kingdom, it looks more and more like he will have to act in a drastic way. A way he dreads.   Meanwhile, Arthur and Merlin are growing closer and closer and might just have feelings for each other. Something they probably should be better about realizing, considering the example of Gwen and Morgana right next to them.   In a land of myth and a time of magic, the destiny of a great kingdom now rests on the shoulders of four, their names: Merlin, Arthur, Guinevere, and Morgana

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 105,376Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 91

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,575Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 83

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

entry.title: i was drunk again, causing accidents
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 759Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Arthur finished the round and stepped back, lowering his sword. A few more instructions, a correction here, a nod there— Then— He moved. Toward Merlin and Freya. Gwaine’s grin widened.

entry.title: Three Teardrops
entry.summary:
Author: grlnxtdr29

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,514Chapters: 14/14Kudos: 37

Summary: The Search for the Dragon Eggs continues in this sequel to Of Legends and (Rugby) Kings. Now that Charlie and the Paris Squad are starting to remember their past, it is time to focus on helping the Sorcerer complete his Quest to restore the Dragon Race, and bring Magick back to the world. Along the way, they will encounter old foes, and new ones, while discovering things about themselves they never realized before. There will be memories of Camelot, and perhaps even some surprises along the way!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Nicholas "Nick" Nelson/Charles "Charlie" Spring
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Tara Jones/Darcy Olsson
  • Elle Argent/Tao Xu

entry.title: Sublysis
entry.summary:
Author: RubiesareforHunting

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 183,249Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 452

Summary: Merlin is a great detective. They call him Magic, for a reason. But when Arthur Pendragon realizes that the famous detective who has been plaguing his criminal organization for five years, is designated Submissive…well. All’s fair in love and war. At an impasse where both of them will do anything it takes to keep the other one from revealing their secrets, the only way to survive might just be a truce that neither of their organizations can know about.Mutually assured destruction never felt so good.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Gwen (Merlin)

  • BDSM

  • Implied Consent
  • Bondage
  • Blackmail
  • Hurt/Comfort
  • emotional tension
  • Dom Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Sub Merlin (Merlin)
  • Villain Arthur Pendragon
  • Organized Crime

entry.title: Lost to All But Time
entry.summary:
Author: a_written_simulacra

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,365Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 23

Summary: Merlin has waited beside the lake for over 1,500 years, and when he finally gets a visitor, it's not Arthur Pendragon--but an eccentric English man who arrives in a blue telephone box, calls himself the Doctor, and claims that not only is time travel real, but it's absolutely imperative that Merlin go back in time with him--back to the age of Camelot where Prince Arthur is very much alive.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
